description.ko: 고요한 진동판 위의 성긴 주파수 선들이 튀듯 반응하며 보이지 않는 리듬을 압력과 위상, 메아리로 시각화합니다.
description.en: Sparse frequency lines snap across a silent resonant surface, turning invisible rhythm into visual pressure, phase, and echo.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization as a top-down minimalist acoustic score drawn across a matte white resonant plate: sparse hairline waveforms stretch diagonally in #4169E1 royal blue, then abruptly snap into fast #FF4500 orange attack notches as if struck by an invisible rhythm. Tiny #FFD700 gold phase dots appear only at pressure peaks, with a few #32CD32 lime ticks marking syncopated frequency jumps. The composition is mostly negative space, crisp vector-thin lines, sharp bends, offset echoes, and staggered vibration trails showing sound without any visible instrument or speaker. Rhythmic, fast, low-particle, high-contrast visual resonance in silence.
